mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pa_txn_leasing_prospect ( company_id, lead_id, prospect_no, customer_id, customer_code, customer_type, customer_name, trade_license_no, cr_number, vat_registration_no, contact_person, contact_role, contact_title, mobile_no, phone_no, email, preferred_contact_method, fax_no, address, source, purpose, commercial_need, document_notes, status, created_by ) VALUES ( #{companyId}, #{leadId}, #{prospectNo}, #{customerId}, #{customerCode}, #{customerType}, #{customerName}, #{tradeLicenseNo}, #{crNumber}, #{vatRegistrationNo}, #{contactPerson}, #{contactRole}, #{contactTitle}, #{mobileNo}, #{phoneNo}, #{email}, #{preferredContactMethod}, #{faxNo}, #{address}, #{source}, #{purpose}, #{commercialNeed}, #{documentNotes}, #{status}, #{createdBy} ) SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
mapper.update: UPDATE pa_txn_leasing_prospect SET customer_type = #{customerType}, customer_name = #{customerName}, trade_license_no = #{tradeLicenseNo}, cr_number = #{crNumber}, vat_registration_no = #{vatRegistrationNo}, contact_person = #{contactPerson}, contact_role = #{contactRole}, contact_title = #{contactTitle}, mobile_no = #{mobileNo}, phone_no = #{phoneNo}, email = #{email}, preferred_contact_method = #{preferredContactMethod}, fax_no = #{faxNo}, address = #{address}, source = #{source}, purpose = #{purpose}, commercial_need = #{commercialNeed}, document_notes = #{documentNotes}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE pa_txn_leasing_prospect SET status = #{status}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id}
